query: SELECT id, appId, name, dataSource, dataSourceConfig FROM customApps WHERE name LIKE '%LiDAR%' OR name LIKE '%Stats%' OR name LIKE '%Monitor%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3HixaTvZ1BE3FFg.root --database cJLhozXEame73NuZqMLXuR --execute SELECT id, appId, name, dataSource, dataSourceConfig FROM customApps WHERE name LIKE '%LiDAR%' OR name LIKE '%Stats%' OR name LIKE '%Monitor%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
